subcodes.title: Words to Mon. Richard, spoken on 1913-05-10
subcodes.first_line: the Persian Bahá'í women ... are being educated and new ideals spread amongst them. Their hearts and consciences are free.
subcodes.subjects: @law of transformation and change, @spiritual transformation, @light and darkness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @role and station of women, @equality of men and women, @critique of Eastern values; culture
